summary: Tested iteration 142 changes (AI summary edit endpoint, edit_log, role-aware helper text, persistent AI cards). Backend: 9/9 pytest pass — PATCH /api/procedures/{id}/ai-summary validates input, persists, is idempotent, appends edit_log only on non-owner edits, blocks nurses (403), and PDF case-report includes both 'AI Clinical Summary' and 'AI Surgical Summary' headings. Frontend: AI summary generation/persistence works functionally (REGEN AI label appears after generate, ai_case_summary persists), Phase 2 form has the role-aware helper logic in source and the OLD Generate Surgical Notes block was removed. CRITICAL TESTABILITY BUG: every new `data-testid` prop added in this iteration on RN `TouchableOpacity` / `TextInput` components is NOT forwarded to the DOM — RN Web only converts `testID` (camelCase). Existing buttons that use `testID` (e.g. case-report-export-print-btn, case-detail-back-btn) render correctly; all new ones (ai-summary-btn, ai-clinical-edit-btn, ai-surgical-generate-btn, ai-surgical-edit-btn, ai-surgical-regenerate-btn, ai-surgical-edit-input, ai-surgical-save-btn, ai-surgical-cancel-btn, approval-comment-input, phase2-approval-helper, phase2-submit-btn, phase2-student-notes) do not appear in DOM. Functionality works but automation/E2E testing per the spec cannot use these selectors.

ui_bugs.issue: All NEW `data-testid="..."` props on RN TouchableOpacity/TextInput/Text are dropped by React Native Web — they don't appear as DOM attributes. RN Web only auto-converts the camelCase `testID` prop. Replace `data-testid="foo"` with `testID="foo"` on RN components, OR (for web-only) wrap in a View/Pressable that accepts raw DOM props.

design_issues.screen: Case Details (case detail rendered as one ScrollView)
issues: Console floods with `Unexpected text node: . A text node cannot be a child of a <View>.` errors (12+ on every case open). Likely a stray whitespace/empty-string child of <View> introduced somewhere in the AI Surgical / AI Clinical card refactor. Cosmetic but indicates a render bug to track down.

action_items: FRONTEND TESTABILITY (HIGH): In all five files modified this iteration, change `data-testid="..."` to `testID="..."` on every RN component (TouchableOpacity, TextInput, Text, View, Pressable, ActivityIndicator etc.). RN Web translates `testID` -> DOM `data-testid` automatically; raw `data-testid` is silently dropped. Affected ids include but are not limited to: ai-summary-btn, ai-clinical-edit-btn, ai-surgical-generate-btn, ai-surgical-edit-btn, ai-surgical-regenerate-btn, ai-surgical-edit-input, ai-surgical-save-btn, ai-surgical-cancel-btn, approval-comment-input, phase2-approval-helper, phase2-submit-btn, phase2-student-notes (and the equivalents on submit-stage2-surgical, submit-stage2-prosthetic, submit-phase4-step2).

FRONTEND (MEDIUM): Track down the source of `Unexpected text node: . A text node cannot be a child of a <View>` warnings on procedures/[id].tsx — usually a `{cond && ' '}` or `{value}` rendering an empty string outside of <Text>. Likely added by the recent AI-card refactor.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend PATCH /api/procedures/{id}/ai-summary is well-shaped: pydantic-style validation via manual checks, idempotency, owner detection via student_id||created_by_id, and edit_log push only on non-owner. Looks production-ready.
Frontend uses the wrong web testing prop on RN components — see HIGH action item.

submit-phase2/[id].tsx role-aware helper logic at lines 891-897 is correct: hides for implant_incharge, supervisor sees the In-Charge variant, others see the original line. Same pattern should be auditable on the other three forms (not directly UI-tested due to the same testID forwarding issue but source-verified).
test_credentials: Used /app/memory/test_credentials.md — Abhijit.patil/Admin@123 (admin/implant_incharge), Gaurav.pandey/Student@123 (student), Paresh.gandhi/Supervisor@123 (supervisor). All login OK.
seed_data_creation: None. Reused student-owned case TEST_MUA_88c4430c (id 69f640160ae04a75cf8d0cd8) for UI tests. The known id 69cfde8b356c7405230a9dcc from the request still exists and was used for backend tests; module-scope fixture wipes both ai_case_summary and ai_surgical_notes back to empty strings on module exit.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression for iteration 142 lives at /app/backend/tests/test_ai_summary_iteration142.py — keep running it. The big open item is frontend data-testid forwarding; once main agent flips `data-testid` -> `testID` on the RN components in the five modified files, re-run the case-detail Playwright loop (login as student Gaurav, click TEST_MUA_88c4430c, wait ~10s; assert presence of the new testids and exercise the AI Surgical edit/save flow on a Phase-2-approved case). Status of the test case TEST_MUA_88c4430c is 'Phase 1 Approved - Ready for Phase 2' so ai-surgical-generate-btn correctly stays hidden — to test the Phase-2-approved branch, pick a case whose status is in {phase2_approved, pending_stage2_surgical, ...}.
rca_of_the_issue: RCA — data-testid not appearing in DOM: React Native components (TouchableOpacity, TextInput, Pressable, etc.) do not pass arbitrary lowercase HTML attributes through to the underlying DOM node on RN-Web; RN-Web specifically maps `testID` (camelCase) -> `data-testid` and drops other unknown props. The recent diff added `data-testid="..."` directly which is the React-DOM convention — works only on raw <div>/<button>/<input>, not on RN wrappers. Fix: replace every newly-added `data-testid=` with `testID=` (or for the helper <Text>, wrap in `<View testID=...>`). Reproduction: login as student, open any case, evaluate `document.querySelector('[data-testid="ai-summary-btn"]')` -> null while clicking by visible text 'AI SUMMARY' triggers the spinner and generates the summary.
